entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Crops grown by growers in polyhouse protected farming

entities.name: ENTREPRENEURIAL BEHAVIOR
entities.description: The behavior of vegetable growers involved in polyhouse protected farming, characterized by dimensions like risk-taking and innovativeness

entities.name: POLYHOUSE PROTECTED FARMING
entities.description: A method of farming using protected structures to grow vegetables

entities.name: RURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The improvement of rural areas enabled by agricultural entrepreneurship

entities.name: ECONOMIC GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in economic output enabled by agricultural entrepreneurship

entities.name: MIXED SAMPLING METHODOLOGY
entities.description: A research sampling approach used to select participants

entities.name: PERSONAL INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A data collection method involving direct interaction with growers

entities.name: ENTREPRENEURIAL BEHAVIOR INDEX COMPUTATION
entities.description: A statistical technique used to quantify entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: KENDALL’S TAU CORRELATION
entities.description: A statistical technique used to measure the association between variables

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: The financial earnings from farming, which positively correlates with entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: EXPERIENCE IN PROTECTED CULTIVATION
entities.description: The duration of time spent in polyhouse farming, positively correlating with entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: AREA ALLOCATED FOR POLYHOUSE CULTIVATION
entities.description: The physical size of the polyhouse area, positively correlating with entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: EXTENSION CONTACT
entities.description: The level of interaction with agricultural extension services, positively correlating with entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: EDUCATION LEVEL
entities.description: The formal schooling attained by growers, influencing specific dimensions of entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: RISK-TAKING ABILITY
entities.description: A dimension of entrepreneurial behavior that negatively correlates with education level

entities.name: COSMOPOLITENESS
entities.description: A dimension of entrepreneurial behavior that positively correlates with education level

entities.name: INNOVATIVENESS
entities.description: A dimension of entrepreneurial behavior that positively correlates with education level

entities.name: FAMILY SIZE
entities.description: The number of members in the grower's family, showing no significant association with entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: The gender of the grower, showing no significant association with entrepreneurial behavior

entities.name: FINANCIAL INCENTIVES
entities.description: Policy measures recommended to encourage entrepreneurship

entities.name: EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Services providing technical knowledge to growers, recommended to foster entrepreneurship

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The overall progress of the agricultural sector fostered by sustainable entrepreneurship
